message:
fix(tests): update format assertions for bd text parity

Update test assertions to match new bd-parity text formats:
- conformance_text_output: fix extract_id_from_create for both br/bd formats,
  document show_not_found exit code as intentional difference
- e2e_queries: update "Ready work", "Blocked issues", "Issue Database Status"
- e2e_ready: update header and priority badge format assertions
- conformance_schema: respect CARGO_TARGET_DIR for binary discovery

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
